recommendations.title: 7th Heaven
recommendations.overview: In 1910s Paris, a sewer worker disillusioned with Christianity feels his prayers have been answered when he chances upon a street waif and they fall in love.

recommendations.title: The King of the Street Cleaners
recommendations.overview: Going through his daily routine in a stereotypical neighborhood, a street cleaner falls in love with a charwoman. Unfortunately for him, so does his superior officer.

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: Delicacy
recommendations.overview: A French woman mourning over the death of her husband three years prior is courted by a Swedish co-worker.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: The Fury of a Patient Man
recommendations.overview: Quiet Jose woos cafe worker Ana, but she is unaware he has intentions other than the purely romantic.

recommendations.title: We Bought a Zoo
recommendations.overview: Benjamin has lost his wife and, in a bid to start his life over, purchases a large house that has a zoo – welcome news for his daughter, but his son is not happy about it. The zoo is in need of renovation and Benjamin sets about the work with the hea

recommendations.title: Fierce Creatures
recommendations.overview: Ex-policeman Rollo Lee is sent to run Marwood Zoo, the newly acquired business of a New Zealand tycoon. In order to meet high profit targets and keep the zoo open, Rollo enforces a new 'fierce creatures' policy, whereby only the most impressive and d

recommendations.title: F*ck Love Too
recommendations.overview: In this romantic comedy, several friends, each dealing with unhappy love lives, turn to each other for help - but not always with the best results.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.
